chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P N0.D-1085 0{ 2022 ٥٥t٤ Order with signature of Jucge For hearing of maln case 12.03.2024 M٢, Ali Raza Balouch AAG Innn nrar ١٠٨٢ Achar Khan Gabol advocate has Iiled Vakalatnama behalf of Petitioner along with statement and photocopy of letter dated 04.03.2024 which is taken on record and has further stated that NOC to take out processions and Majalis in Muhorom ul Horom has been granted by Deputy Commissioner, Sukkur to the petitioner hence SSP Iay directe provide due protection t٨٤ processions In accordance with law to which learned AAG ٥35 objection AccordingI٧ this petition disposed havinB served SSP Sukkur shall act in accordance with law and provide due purpose protection to the processions at the relevant time in accordance with |aw.
